name: wilson-gpu
description: Rented-GPU cost guardrail + lifecycle for RunPod / Vast.ai. SessionStart surfaces every still-billing instance (uptime + estimated cost so far) so a forgotten pod never leaks money; /wilson-gpu is the kill switch (down) and wires an instance into the wilson-pool roster (attach). Operating strategies: watch (visibility), budget ($ ceiling escalation), idle-reaper (flag past max-hours), ephemeral (flag wilson-gpu-provisioned). Money/destroy actions are double-gated by SEPARATE off-by-default switches: provisioning (up also needs --yes) and reaping (any strategy auto-down). fanout is a cost-tolerance decision aid for shardable jobs (on/off, OFF by default — never auto-executes). Inert unless runpodctl / vastai is on PATH. Opt out: SIDECAR_NO_GPU=1.
